text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Sigh... This test covers too much. I was hoping to focus on training for my races too, but at this rate...
choice_data_list: Juggling classes and races must be tough.
Juggling classes and races must be tough.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. As if you'd know. Your workload decreases
whenever I have to study for tests.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
No kidding. I thought I knew what I was getting
myself into when I came to Tracen, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Maybe I should give up on training too hard
during exam season...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Maybe I should give up on training too hard
during exam season...
Stop right there, you prickly pear!
Stop right there, you cool cactus!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
That's a big no-no! Are you trying to sap the color
from your world by your own hand?!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
You're gonna let society get you down and give
up on what you wanna do? Take a big ol' bite
outta that kinda mentality!

text_block_list.name: Pearl and Windy
text_block_list.text:
We are Worldwide Windy! We're the whirlwind
that bites the world!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Do whatever you wanna do! Who cares about
stuff like tests?

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
You're too naive, Windy! A true racer of the
world needs to be greedy enough to achieve
both!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Uh, sure, but I don't have that kind of time...

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Well, that's an easy fix. ♪ If you can't make
more time, then just train more in the time you do
have!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Don't confine yourself to rigid, formulaic training!
Practice more efficiently and boldly!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: In other words, you must do special training!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Special training? For what?!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Your trainer here will lay it all out for you! ♪
Well? What is it Dober needs to catch up with the
world?
choice_data_list:
Th-the determination to keep chasing her
dreams!
The power to overcome her nerves, I guess?

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Your trainer here will lay it all out for you! ♪
Well? What is it Dober needs to catch up with the
world?
choice_data_list:
Th-the determination to keep chasing her
dreams!
The power to overcome her nerves, I guess?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Determination...

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Determination's real important! I have the
determination to keep pullin' pranks on people
no matter how mad they get at me!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
I've got it, Dober! If you want to improve your
determination...

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Hiking is the answer!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
A corner of the world we live in... In other words,
the outside world!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
By hiking, you don't mean that giant mountain in
the distance, do you?!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
I certainly do. ♪ If you seek the summit in life,
then you must first reach the summit of a
mountain!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Wh-what?! Is that really how it works?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... This is so hard...

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
No complaining, girl! We're aiming for the
summit, aka your dream of reaching stardom in
the racing world!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Can you make it?! Surely you can get to the new
world without stopping!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I-I know all that, but must I do it while pulling my
trainer on a sled?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
The extra weight isn't bothering me, but it's so
difficult to keep my balance while walking...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I don't need your encouragement!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I know!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
You made it! You've reached the summit! This is a
special stage only those with true determination
can reach!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
You made it! You've reached the summit! This is a
special stage only those with true determination
can reach!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Now, unleash your passion! Shout out your dream
with all your heart!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: My dream... I—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I want to become strong enough to compete
against Air Groove and the rest of the Mejiro
family!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Heh! You were so cool just now, even the world
acknowledges you for who you are!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: That wasn't half bad! I'll give you that much!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
A-all I could think about was putting one foot in
front of the other...
choice_data_list: You look stronger than you did before the hike.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Q-quit making fun of me!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Not you too, Trainer! Stop trying to embarrass
me!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Still, I guess that did help toughen me up...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Still, I guess that did help toughen me up...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Later, possibly thanks to her special training,
Mejiro Dober does well both on her exams and in
her training.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: The power to overcome my nerves...

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
That tracks! I can't pull off any pranks if I'm too
nervous 'bout things!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: I have a plan! Now, then...

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Let's scale a cliff!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Because there's no training more suited to
conquering the hurdle known as anxiety!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Er... So you're saying that this cliff is my anxiety?

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Precisely! I couldn't have asked for a more perfect
and sophisticated answer! ♪ A new world awaits
you beyond that wall!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I-I don't know about that...
choice_data_list:
I'll climb it with you! I want to overcome this
together!

I'll climb it with you! I want to overcome this
together!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Are you kidding me?! There's no reason for you to
climb it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Don't be ridiculous! You might get hurt if you try!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Waiting is part of your job! Use that path over
there to get to the top instead.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry about me. Use that path and wait for
me at the end... just like you always do for me at
my races.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Urgh! This is just as tough as I thought...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Urgh! This is just as tough as I thought...

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
The flowing breeze, the smell of the earth...
Whew! I can feel the pulse of the world! ♪

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
You're slowing down, girl! This can't be the extent
of your willpower, can it?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Of course not!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(If I can climb this cliff, it'll prove how strong I've
become, and I won't have to be scared of
anything!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I... did it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Well... Yeah, I did.
choice_data_list: It looks like you had fun.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Thank you... For some reason, it felt like I was in a
race.
choice_data_list: It looks like you had fun.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: As if...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I guess...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, I do feel stronger now, so I suppose that
wasn't a total waste of time.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
It was a reckless climb, but I'm feeling better now,
and I think I'm stronger too...

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. ♪ Looks like you've broken through
another one of your shells and made it to a new
world!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. ♪ Looks like you've broken through
another one of your shells and made it to a new
world!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: You should be grateful to us!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Haha... I had no idea what was going on the whole
time... but this really did make me tougher.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Thank you both. And... I guess you too, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Thank you both. And... Trainer, thank you to you
too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Later, possibly thanks to her special training,
Mejiro Dober does well both on her exams and in
her training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Later, possibly thanks to her special training,
Mejiro Dober does well both on her exams and in
her training.
